examples: Let's just chill at home tonight.
We spent the weekend chilling by the pool.
context: This weekend was a blast, but now I'm beat, so I'm just having a chill last night in the hotel room.

examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: And that's when I knew without a doubt that they were definitely ready for marriage.

examples: I was exhausted after the long hike.
She looked exhausted from working overtime.
The kids were exhausted after playing all day.
context: I had an amazing first day in Seoul but man, I'm exhausted so I'm going to cut into this gorgeous cake that one of the students' moms made for me.

examples: We went to a fancy restaurant for our anniversary.

You look gorgeous in that dress!
What a gorgeous view from the mountain top.
context: I had an amazing first day in Seoul but man, I'm exhausted so I'm going to cut into this gorgeous cake that one of the students' moms made for me.

examples: This place has a great vibe.
I'm getting good vibes from this restaurant.
The vibe at the concert was electric.
context: Everything sounds good right now. Friday night vibe.
